title: Modular Encyclopedia Knowledge Card AI
sourceTitle: Modular Encyclopedia Knowledge Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable modular encyclopedia knowledge card with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable modular encyclopedia knowledge card built around Samoyed dog. main visual: clean friendly full-body dog illustration/photo hybrid. info modules: profile, temperament, grooming, exercise, suitability. rating system: five compact score bars. composition: vertical composition, modular information layout, clear hierarchy, readable sections, generous spacing, and a strong central visual. style: Premium information-design language with clean modules, readable hierarchy, restrained decoration, and collectible reference-board polish. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition subject: Samoyed dog as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
